approaches.title: Sliding Window with Manual Indexing
approaches.summary: Initial sliding window implementation using explicit loop and index management for subarray sum calculation.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Introduced sliding window with manual start/end index tracking and loop-based expansion/contraction.

approaches.title: Idiomatic Sliding Window
approaches.summary: Refined sliding window approach using for-loop and while-loop for cleaner subarray sum management.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Simplified to idiomatic Rust with for-loop enumeration and while-loop contraction, improving readability.
